name: Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement Ltd.
h1: Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement's GCC footprint in India
lede: Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Mumbai and Kochi, covering CoE and ssc, built over 26 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Mumbai, Kochi), covering CoE and ssc. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement's India footprint covers Mumbai and Kochi, spanning CoE and ssc. The centers deliver Finance & Accounting for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all three decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 3 leaders at Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement's India centers, across HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.
